summary: Promoted ADR 0315 into canonical mainline truth by cutting repository version `0.177.140` on top of the `0.177.139` baseline, replaying the governed Windmill operator admin surface from the refreshed exact-main worktree, and re-verifying that the deployed `f/lv3/operator_access_admin` raw-app bundle still matches the repo bytes exactly while carrying the canonical page-state and next-best-action guidance across the live operator workflow.

verification.observed: `uv run --with pyyaml python3 scripts/release_manager.py status --json` reported the release blockers needed for the exact-main replay were satisfied, `--dry-run` confirmed the single ADR 0315 unreleased note, and the first `--bump patch --released-on 2026-04-02` write prepared repository version `0.177.140` before a post-write Outline sync returned `502`. The preserved follow-on write (`release-write-r2`) truthfully shows no remaining `## Unreleased` bullets because the release bundle had already been written.

`make converge-windmill` completed successfully from the refreshed exact-main worktree with final recap `docker-runtime-lv3 : ok=327 changed=46 unreachable=0 failed=0 skipped=84`, `postgres-lv3 : ok=93 changed=2 unreachable=0 failed=0 skipped=28`, and `proxmox_florin : ok=41 changed=4 unreachable=0 failed=0 skipped=16`.
`pytest tests/test_validation_gate.py tests/test_validation_gate_windmill.py tests/test_windmill_operator_admin_app.py -q` returned `29 passed in 4.51s` from the integrated release tree.

verification.check: Raw-app typecheck and Windmill syntax lane
verification.observed: The temporary raw-app checkout passed `npm ci --no-audit --no-fund` and `npx tsc --noEmit`, and `make syntax-check-windmill` completed successfully from the exact-main worktree.

Authenticated verification against `/api/w/lv3/apps/get/p/f/lv3/operator_access_admin` returned the expected raw-app payload, the browser route returned `200`, the deployed `/App.tsx` and `/index.css` SHA-256 digests matched the exact-main worktree exactly, and the live app still contains `Next best action`, `Help and recovery`, `Background Refresh`, `Validation Error`, `System Error`, `Unauthorized`, `Not Found`, `Latest Result`, `windmill-operator-access-admin`, and `validate-repository-automation`.

verification.check: Generated truth and repository automation bundle
verification.observed: The integrated release tree passed `scripts/generate_adr_index.py --write`, `scripts/canonical_truth.py --write`, `scripts/platform_manifest.py --write`, `scripts/generate_diagrams.py --write`, `./scripts/validate_repo.sh agent-standards`, `./scripts/validate_repo.sh workstream-surfaces`, `scripts/validate_repository_data_models.py --validate`, `scripts/live_apply_receipts.py --validate`, `make validate`, `make remote-validate`, `make pre-push-gate`, and `git diff --check`.

notes: This receipt is the canonical exact-main record for ADR 0315. The earlier branch-local receipt remains historical evidence for the first worktree replay from repository version `0.177.135` and platform version `0.130.85`.

The first release-manager write failed only during the post-write Outline sync, after the protected release surfaces had already been updated to repository version `0.177.140`; `release-write-r2` is intentionally preserved to explain why the second write saw no remaining unreleased bullets.

The follow-on validation bundle has now passed from this same exact-main integration tree, so the final merge can push repository version `0.177.140` and platform version `0.130.88` without any remaining merge-only truth updates.
